title: Excavations at Tel Beth-Shean 1989–1996, Volume I
author: Amihai Mazar
publisher: Israel Exploration Society / Hebrew University of Jerusalem
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted excavation report. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Primary publication of the renewed Beth-Shean excavations: the Egyptian garrison town, its decline, and the Iron I town on the tell — the setting for the display of Saul's body in 1 Samuel 31 and for Milestone 3's Beth-shan scene.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; volume details to verify before M3 scene design.
